decisions.question: Exception pattern for PayrollPeriodClosedException
decisions.answer: InvalidOperationException subclass with Guid periodId constructor

decisions.question: HTTP response code for closed-period modification
Domain guard method name
decisions.answer: EnsureOpen() on PayrollPeriod domain entity (already implemented)

decisions.question: Integration test DB seeding for PayrollLine (no FK constraint on ServiceExecutionId)
decisions.answer: Seed PayrollLine directly via NursingCareDbContext with fake serviceExecutionId GUID
decisions.rationale: ServiceExecutionId in PayrollLine has only a unique index, no FK constraint — direct DB seeding with fake GUIDs is safe

findings.description: All 7 implementation guards (domain method, exception class, 4 repository guards, 2 override guards, 1 service guard, middleware mapping) were already fully implemented in the codebase. The brief assumed they needed to be created. Only the integration test file was missing.
PayrollPeriodImmutabilityTests.cs (domain unit tests) was already present at tests/NursingCareBackend.Domain.Tests/Payroll/PayrollPeriodImmutabilityTests.cs with 9 tests.

JwtTestTokens.CreateAdminTokenForUser(IServiceProvider, Guid) method was missing — needed for the approve-override test which requires two different admin users. Added the public overload to JwtTestTokens.cs.

auto_resolutions.before: JwtTestTokens had no public method to create a token for a specific userId
auto_resolutions.after: Added CreateAdminTokenForUser(IServiceProvider, Guid) public static method

deviations_from_plan.what: Files 1-4 in MODIFY list and file 5-6 CREATE list were already fully implemented
deviations_from_plan.why: The codebase was already ahead of the brief. All guards, exception, domain method, domain tests were present. Only the integration test file was genuinely missing.
deviations_from_plan.impact: Reduced scope — only created 1 file instead of 7. All tests pass confirming the existing implementation is correct.

self_verification.notes: Build 0 errors. Domain tests 18/18 passed (9 immutability + 9 CareRequest). Integration tests 7/7 passed. dotnet format --verify-no-changes exited 0.
